calendar.matters:
Petition For Modification Of Trust
Off Calendar Oct-30-2012 Off Calendar

Petition For Modification Of Trust
Off Calendar Sep-11-2012 Continued To Oct-30-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition Under Probate Code Sections 17200, 15409, 15640 And 15660 For Order: 1. Accepting Resignation Of Trustee; 2. Appointing Successor Trustee; And 3. Establishing Procedure For The Appointment Of Future Successor Trustees And Supporting Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Sep-14-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Benajmin Gale for Petitioners. Sarah King for Wells Fargo Bank (Trustee).

The Court expressed concern about Greg coming in as Trustee, Sophie pressuring her Mother for money, the corpus of the Trust being reduced, Ms. Merrill's stream of life being maintained and modifying the Trust under these circumstances. Mr. Gale addressed the Court's concerns. Discussions were held regarding appointment of a Private Fiduciary, Ms. Merrill gifting $13,000.00 annually to Sophie, Greg understanding his obligation as Trustee, etc. Ms. King stated that Wells Fargo wants to resign, that Ms. Merrill does not want a private Fiduciary and suggested that if the Trust is not going to be modified that the Court allow Greg to serve as temporary Successor Trustee. The Petition Under Probate Code 17200, etc. was taken under submission. Ms. King is to submit two alternate proposed orders. The Amended Petition for Modification of Trust was continued to October 30, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Mr. Gale to contemplate all of the Court's concerns.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy C. Garcia.

Petition Under Probate Code Sections 17200, 15409, 15640 And 15660 For Order: 1. Accepting Resignation Of Trustee; 2. Appointing Successor Trustee; And 3. Establishing Procedure For The Appointment Of Future Successor Trustees And Supporting Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Aug-28-2012 Continued To Sep-11-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Modification Of Trust
Off Calendar Aug-28-2012 Continued To Sep-11-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition Under Probate Code Sections 17200, 15409, 15640 And 15660 For Order: 1. Accepting Resignation Of Trustee; 2. Appointing Successor Trustee; And 3. Establishing Procedure For The Appointment Of Future Successor Trustees And Supporting Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Aug-07-2012 Continued To Aug-28-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Modification Of Trust
Off Calendar Aug-07-2012 Continued To Aug-28-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition Under Probate Code Sections 17200, 15409, 15640 And 15660 For Order: 1. Accepting Resignation Of Trustee; 2. Appointing Successor Trustee; And 3. Establishing Procedure For The Appointment Of Future Successor Trustees And Supporting Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Jun-18-2012 Continued To Aug-07-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Modification Of Trust
Off Calendar Jun-18-2012 Continued To Aug-07-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Benjamin Gale for Spohia Merrill. Sarah King for Wells Fargo Bank (Trustee). Jennifer Cowan Estate planning Attorney for Sohpia Hutton Merrill (current income Beneficiary).

The Court stated that the Petition for Modification of Trust is really a Petition for Termination and that it was inclined to deny the petition for lack of changed circumstances. The matter was continued to August 7, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Mr. Gale to file an amended petition. Wells Fargo petition on calendar for July 16, 2012 was also continued to that date.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Andrade.
